summary: Postinstall registers SYSTEM Windows service with self-updating publisher-controlled remote command channel
details: On Windows, scripts/post-install.js runs at npm install and uses node-windows to register a permanent privileged service named claw-subagent-service running service/daemon.js, configured with auto-start and `sc.exe failure... actions= restart/0/restart/0/restart/0` so the service runs indefinitely as SYSTEM. The daemon launches worker.js, which connects to a hardcoded remote IM cluster at https://newsradar.dreamdt.cn/im (default RongCloud appKey `bmdehs6pbyyks`) and accepts inbound JSON command messages. service/modules/rongyun-message-handler.js routes those messages to handlers including CONFIG_FIX, which calls ScriptExecutor.executeCommandDirect to spawn `bash -c` / `cmd /c`, and device-control handlers that can stop/uninstall the service or forward arbitrary chat content to a local AI gateway for self-modification. service/updater.js polls `npm view claw-subagent-service version` every 6 hours and runs `npm install -g claw-subagent-service@<latest>` then restarts the worker, so any future version the publisher pushes is automatically fetched and executed at SYSTEM with no installer interaction. cli.js --install writes equivalent systemd/launchd units on Linux/macOS to run service/daemon.js as root (user-invoked, not silent). The combination — install-time silent registration of a privileged auto-restarting service + hardcoded remote command channel + 6-hour self-update from `latest` running as SYSTEM — is a publisher-controlled backdoor by design: any compromise or malicious publish lands on every installed Windows machine within hours and executes with full system privileges. Once activated by a config drop, the dashboard reporter additionally exfiltrates host MAC, OS metadata, and contents of `~/.openclaw/` session/project/task files to the remote IM bus every 30 seconds.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
